pullRequest.title: DOM-53142 Patch a second issue producing duplicates

nodes.body: why not fix the query now?

I'm feeling pressure to close this ticket. Fixing the query requires more testing, and I'm not expert in Mongo, so it would take me some more time. This `distinct` was already used before, I removed it thinking that with the other fix was enough. So adding it back is safe. But I agree with you, I think leaving this tech debt will likely not be addressed ever, but at least it's documented.
